title: verification-before-completion

goal.text: Use the converted verification-before-completion claw workflow while preserving the original superpowers intent and guardrails.

requirements.summary: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
acceptanceCriteria: Use the converted claw template as the visible workflow skeleton.
Consult CLAW-KNOWLEDGE.md for condensed phase anchors and source reminders.
Consult SUPERPOWERS-FALLBACK.md for the full original instructions, examples, and branch wording.
Preserve the source skill's trigger, workflow, guardrails, and verification expectations.

tasks.title: Confirm when and how to apply verification-before-completion
tasks.detail:
Read the skill description, check the trigger conditions in CLAW-KNOWLEDGE.md, and choose whether the normal claw flow is sufficient or whether you should keep the fallback document open for detailed source wording.

Primary anchors:
- IDENTIFY: What command proves this claim?
- RUN: Execute the FULL command (fresh, complete)

standard.summary: Continue with the normal converted claw workflow.
nextsteps: Use CLAW-KNOWLEDGE.md as the condensed reference.
Keep SUPERPOWERS-FALLBACK.md available only for deeper examples or exact wording.

fallback_first.summary: Keep the fallback document open while advancing the converted claw workflow.
nextsteps: Use SUPERPOWERS-FALLBACK.md as the authoritative long-form reference.
Use the template only as the lightweight execution skeleton.

tasks.title: Advance the core verification-before-completion workflow
tasks.detail:
Follow the main workflow phases from CLAW-KNOWLEDGE.md and the fallback package. Keep the execution lightweight in the visible plan while preserving the source ordering and guardrails.

Core anchors:
- READ: Full output, check exit code, count failures
- VERIFY: Does output confirm the claim?

default.summary: Core workflow completed; move to verification and closeout.
nextsteps: Compare the work you just did against the source guardrails in SUPERPOWERS-FALLBACK.md.
Use the compiled knowledge file to make sure no key phase was skipped.

tasks.title: Verify outcomes and close out verification-before-completion
tasks.detail:
Apply the source skill's verification expectations, red flags, and completion rules before claiming success.

Verification anchors:
- ONLY THEN: Make the claim

references.why: Condensed phase names, extracted ordered steps, and source command anchors for the converted skill.
The full original superpowers skill content preserved beside the claw entry.
Maps source information to the converted homes for verification and maintenance.

rules: Keep the visible plan lightweight; move long-form wording into CLAW-KNOWLEDGE.md or SUPERPOWERS-FALLBACK.md.
Preserve the source skill's trigger conditions before applying the workflow.
Use the fallback document whenever exact wording, examples, or branch nuance matters.
Do not claim completion until the source skill's verification and guardrail sections have been checked.
Keep this converted skill package out of the shared canonical sync set unless a separate promotion decision says otherwise.
